title: True: Calamity
body:
# ![It's Dangerous To Go Alone!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f554d60316ae5d47a5ab34afbd71e63e83ec74c.png) It's Dangerous To Go Alone! ![It's Dangerous To Go Alone!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23bd391b114ad5d8f934d74bbfeeae7ae875bf8.png)
![Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f414acbd23fe44f7fc596a4aad8ecd7e95c0740d.png)

## ![Description!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b57bf09c3ad36913e7fe213dea183b3a8220a08.png) Description:
True: Calamity is a modpack heavily inspired by the Legend of Zelda Franchise, taking inspiration from its newest games, Breath of the Wild and Tears of the Kingdom. It makes the most of exploration and mechanics to fill the world with hidden wonders everywhere you look, while also balancing and adding mechanics to other parts of the game, while still trying to stay true to something close enough to Vanilla Minecraft. 

I hope you enjoy!

## ![Questions?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/081bf6c1dfe99f56ca46d61a82a9946e27285696.png) Questions:

<details>
<summary>I have an issue!</summary>
I'll probably get around to fixing any bugs and such by the next update but for specific issues you can either try to solve them yourself or dm me on discord. In the future i could make a server but i dont see the point yet!
</details>
